verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whose report will you believe? (We shall believe the report of the Lord)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His report says "I am healed", His report says "I am filled", His report says " I am free", His report says "victory".

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Shout of joy and victory resound in the tents of the righteous of the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord’s right hand has done mighty things for us, The Lord’s right hand has lifted high, The Lord's right hand reigns on high, The Lord’s right hand reigns on high.
